card.title: Transformer Neural Network
card.summary: The Transformer is a neural network architecture, predominantly used in natural language processing, that revolutionized sequence-to-sequence tasks by exclusively relying on the attention mechanism to process data.
card.how_it_works: Building on the Attention mechanism you already understand, the Transformer processes entire input sequences at once, rather than sequentially. It uses 'self-attention' to weigh the importance of different parts of the input relative to each other, allowing it to capture long-range dependencies efficiently. This enables the model to understand context without recurrence, making it highly parallelizable and effective.

key_components.name: Self-Attention
key_components.description: Allows the model to weigh the importance of different words in an input sequence when encoding a specific word, capturing relationships between all elements.

key_components.name: Positional Encoding
key_components.description: Adds information about the order of words in the sequence, as the attention mechanism itself does not inherently understand position.

key_components.name: Encoder Stack
key_components.description: Processes the input sequence, using self-attention and feed-forward networks to create rich contextual representations for each token.

key_components.name: Decoder Stack
key_components.description: Generates the output sequence step-by-step, using self-attention on its own output, and attention on the encoder's output, combined with feed-forward networks.

key_components.name: Feed-Forward Networks
key_components.description: Applied independently to each position in the sequence, providing non-linear transformations after the attention layers.

use_cases: Translating text between different languages with high accuracy.
Generating coherent and contextually relevant human-like text.
Answering complex questions based on provided documents.
card.analogy: If the Attention mechanism is like highlighting the most important parts of a sentence, the Transformer is like an entire system built to read and understand books *only* by highlighting and cross-referencing these important parts, without ever having to read word-by-word.
